extensionDescription.message: Quickly translate selected text from a floating button, context menu, or popup.

commandTranslatePage.message: Translate current page with Google Translate

optionsIntro.message: No build step, no framework. Configure the selected-text translator here.

localFileIntro.message: Translate selected text on supported local file pages opened with file://. This optional feature requests access only when you enable it.

localFileStatusCheckingDescription.message: Checking the local file permission and Chrome file URL access setting.

localFileDisabledDescription.message: Enable this feature to translate selected text on local file pages.

localFileNeedsAccessTitle.message: Allow access to file URLs is off

localFileNeedsAccessDescription.message: Turn on Chrome's “Allow access to file URLs” switch before enabling local file translation.

localFileEnabledNeedsAccessTitle.message: Enabled, but file URL access is off

localFileEnabledNeedsAccessDescription.message: Chrome's “Allow access to file URLs” switch is still off. Turn it on to use this feature.

localFileEnabledDescription.message: Selected-text translation is available on supported file:// local file pages.

localFileAccessGuideIntro.message: Action required: turn on “Allow access to file URLs” before enabling or using this feature.

localFileAccessStep2.message: Turn on “Allow access to file URLs”.

localFileAccessStep3.message: Return here and click Enable local file translation if shown, then reload or reopen the local file page.

localFilePermissionNotGranted.message: Local file permission was not granted.

localFileCopyLinkFailed.message: Could not copy the settings link.

localFileStatusErrorTitle.message: Could not check local file access

localFileStatusErrorDescription.message: Reload the options page and try again.

sourceTextPlaceholder.message: Type text, or select text on a page and open this popup.

showSelectionButton.message: Show a floating translate button after selecting text

openPageTranslationInCurrentTab.message: Open page translation in the current tab

statusSpeechUnavailable.message: Speech synthesis is not available in this browser.

errorNetwork.message: Network error. Please check your connection.

errorRateLimited.message: Google Translate is temporarily unavailable or rate limited.

errorParse.message: Translate response could not be parsed.
